titleStmt.title: SII 5.1213: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1213. (A.R. No. 331 of 1896). ON THE SAME PILLAR, SOUTH, EAST AND NORTH FACES.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākābdē śaśinētrabāṇanāyanē tvāṣāḍakri
ṣṇē tithau saptamyāṁ kkuppināmā kamaṭhapura
patēḥ sāhasāgraṇyamallaḥ bhōgāyaikāya
paryāptaṁ catvāriṁśadviniṣkāṇyapi gaṇa
nayā tvēkabhōgāya dīpaṁ pradādācaṁdra
tāraṁ sakalanijamanōvāṁcchitā¨rttha
siddhaiḥ . pratapa śrīvīranaranārasiṁgga
dēvaṁkkara vijayarājya saṁvatsa 4 śrā
yini ka¨rkkaṭaka kriṣṇa 7 ravivārē bhōgaparīkṣa narasi
ṁghadāsu paṁḍyāṁkkara Addhikārē . kuppisāhasama
lladatta madyānnabēḷā Uttare bhōṁgekai bhātu
taḷi 3 . Āpālu peṭu 10 gāralu pīṭha 22 . papu Ā 1 pāṇuka
ṭu 1 Ē bhōga Ācāṁdrā¨rggastāĪ hçōĪ bhallibhākai . śrībhāṁḍā
rakkai ddhillagaṁḍalu 40 Ē bhōgabhaḷibhākai taḷī 2 . kaṁsāvi
śya 4 pāṇichaḍibhākai pitaḷipratimākaṁḍarukāpujari
Ē 1 . viccū 2 kkakavya 2 . Akhaṁḍadīpakai gāĪ 25 beṭi Ē 1 . Ē bhō
gārū mannana . Addhikāri siṣṇukai bhātu kuṁcca 1 . gāryālu ma
si 15 . vaṣṇama prakkaraṇakaibhātu kuṁcca 1 . gāryālu
masiki 15 . stānāpati prakaraṇakai bhātu kuṁcca 1 . gā
ryālu māsiki 2 . pradaṇatvarabhātu pasapaḷu duyiki kuṁśa 1
kāḷiṁggi prakaraṇakai sa . ba .The inscription is unfinished. On the left margin of the record are engraved the symbols of conch discus, tortoise on a pedestal and a lamp-stand.
Digital edition of SII 5.1213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
